report_name: Hacker 'AckLine' Leaks Data of 16,000+ Travel Agency Customers for Free on Underground Forum

threat_actors.name: AckLine
threat_actors.description: A threat actor who publicly leaked the personal data of over 16,000 customers of Needlework Tours on an underground hacking forum for free, seemingly to build reputation or cause chaos.
threat_actors.goals: Leak sensitive customer data to the public for notoriety or to cause disruption.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over Web Service
attack_patterns.description: The threat actor AckLine exfiltrated and leaked customer data by posting it for free on an underground web forum.

identities.name: Needlework Tours
identities.description: A Victoria-based Australian travel agency specializing in craft tours. It was the victim of a data breach where the personal records of over 16,000 customers were leaked by the threat actor 'AckLine'.

infrastructure.name: Underground Hacking Forum
infrastructure.description: An underground forum where the threat actor AckLine posted the stolen data from Needlework Tours for free, making it available to any forum member.
